title: JoJo Opening's Music Discs
description: Adds a music disc for *almost* every jojo opening and variation
body:
This mod Currently Adds 12 New Music Disc's which include:

Sono Chi No Sadame (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_N_Uqd7JBcM)

Bloody Stream (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hmpJqJLsR48)

Stand Proud (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oAzNQKbncxA)

Sono Chi No Kioku ~ end of THE WORLD (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BPyQM7FmG8g)

Crazy Noisy Bizarre Town (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qlaRFRA4qFU)

Crazy Noisy Bizarre Town EDM version (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IzkMFVg0ymY)

Chase (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDqnBZ0k_ZE)

Great days (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UztXN2rKQNc)

Fighting Gold (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ub3EI4xw48c)

Uragirimono no Requiem ~ Traitor's Requiem (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JabvfK8fSpk)

STONE OCEAN (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z6nbRXdDfN8)

Heaven's Falling Down (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EKYxjtNRekM)


I own none of the songs i have simply made music disc's out of them
ALL RIGHTS RESERVED TO THEIR ORIGINAL OWNERS

Note: Music disc's do not currently spawn naturally and only obtainment way is through cheats
